full_text: What our members say about the benefits of the AI Academy. “ In under 3 weeks, I went from knowing nothing about AI to automating my reports and saving 5+ hours every week. The tutorials are clear, practical, and packed with value. ” Linda K. Financial Analyst , JPMorgan “ The tutorials are clear, practical, and easy to follow—even for complete beginners. Within 2 weeks, I was automating repetitive tasks and my team noticed the difference. ” Brian P. Project Manager , Notion “ I took the free trial and immediately saw the value. The tutorials helped me cut my content creation time in half. It's been worth every penny. ” Olivia N. Content Strategist , Vanity Fair “ I love how the AI Academy adds new courses every week. 47 new tutorials were added last month alone—I always feel like I'm ahead of the curve.
